data.name: 失落之白 EP2- 躲藏於黑暗中的人們
data.detailed_description:
◆EP1◆


◆EP1-R18◆


Join our Discord!


關於此遊戲

**這是舊版本，我們將不久後重製此系列

◆EP2 躲藏於黑暗中的人們


惡意呀......就像一顆種子，在封閉的人心與環境中，開始茁壯蔓延

好不容易來到了恩惠山第二個區域，那名為「惡意」的美麗仙境。
但等待著伊塔與瑪嘉西亞兩人的，是一片詭異的景況──
陷入死迴圈的路段、以及幾十年前本應死亡的族人，失去了生命氣息的他們，正對兩人展開攻擊。
是幻象？還是不願面對的殘酷真相？
在這片美麗的仙境中，斷續閃過那二十年前失蹤冒險團的殘影，冥冥之中想警告著伊塔甚麼。
究竟，在這座被當地政府封鎖的禁區──恩惠山，隱藏了甚麼悲傷過去？
到底......甚麼是能相信的？

白族的存在、瑪嘉西亞與伊塔的誕生、二十年前失蹤的潔西卡冒險團.......都與神秘的羽光公司有著匪淺的淵源。
一切本看似毫不相干的平行線，終將因為命運而交會在一起，前往無限可能的未來。

「我愛你，不管時間如何流逝。」
「即便這份痛苦終將使我燃燒殆盡，我也會永遠愛著你。」
「請你擁抱我、愛著我、親吻我......最後── 殺了我。」


◆豐富的主線故事
◆六萬字以上的劇情
◆數十張漫畫式精緻CG
◆沒有死亡的機制，但死亡次數將影響隱藏劇情的多寡。
◆與可愛的女主角對話互動
◆壓力值50%以上變換女主角外型
◆全Live2D的H動畫

◆可蒐集衣著與相應的H體位

data.short_description: 這是一款擁有豐富劇情的純愛向RPG，第二集。 伊塔和瑪嘉西亞逃離了封閉且充滿謊言的白族，來到了一個美麗的仙境。 但在這個仙境的各種細節裡，冥冥中透露曾經發生過慘絕人寰的事。 到底，甚麼才是真相呢？

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: Intel
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: Intel I5/I7
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Eternal Liiivie EP2- Hiding in the dark
data.detailed_description:
◆EP1◆


◆EP1-R18◆


Join our Discord!


About the Game

*This is old version, we will remake this project in near future.

◆EP2 Hiding in the Dark



Malice ...... Like a seed that begins to thrive in a closed mind and environment.
After a long journey, they arrived at the second area of Mount Grace, the beautiful wonderland called "Malice".
But what await Ita and Margarcia is a strange scene.
They are caught in a loop, and the villagers, who should have died decades ago, are attacking them.
Is it hallucination? Or is it a brutal truth that people don't want to face...?
In this beautiful wonderland, visions of the missing adventurers from twenty years ago appear intermittently, as if to warn Ita of something.
What is the sad past hidden in this forbidden area--Grace Mountain?
which has been sealed off by the local government?
What exactly can be believed?

The existence of Liiivie, the birth of Margarcia and Ita, and the missing Jessica's adventure group 20 years ago, all have a very close relationship with the mysterious Yu-Guang Corporation.
All the seemingly unrelated parallel lines will finally meet together because of fate and go to an infinite possible future.

"I love you, no matter how much time passes."
"Even if this pain will eventually burn me out, I will always love you."
"Hold me, love me, kiss me ...... And finally - kill me."


◆ Rich main story
◆ Dialogue and interact with Margarcia
◆There is no death mechanism, but death will affect the hidden plots.
◆Change the appearance of the Margarcia when the pressure more than 50%
◆More Live2D H animations

◆New skins, and the corresponding H scence.
